creator: filis@FreeBSD.org
text:
our poudriere failed to build sogo2 last night:

===========================================================================
=======================<phase: package        >============================
===>  Building package for sogo2-2.3.19
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/sogo2/work/stage/usr/local/GNUstep/Local/Library/SOGo/WebServerResources/jquery-ui.js: No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/sogo2/work/stage/usr/local/GNUstep/Local/Library/SOGo/WebServerResources/jquery.js: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/www/sogo2

It seems, the SOGo-2.3.19 tarball is missing those two files, I downloaded the SOGo-2.3.18.tar.gz and they are there.
What is there in 2.3.19, though, are two minified versions:

./UI/WebServerResources/jquery.min.js
./UI/WebServerResources/jquery-ui.min.js

According to the Changelog at

http://packages.inverse.ca/SOGo/sources/ChangeLog-2.3.19

commit 8b2a6b05f1eca98140ff17d7744d5b9b036f1085

added the minified files and deleted the jquery[-ui].js files.
